name: clam-cms-monorepo
description: MCP-native headless CMS for Cloudflare Workers.

scripts.check:starters: pnpm -C starters/publication validate && pnpm -C starters/publication typecheck && pnpm -C starters/blank validate && pnpm -C starters/blank typecheck
scripts.check:starter-theme: cd starters/publication && pnpm theme:fork tokens.ts && pnpm typecheck && pnpm theme:reset tokens.ts && pnpm typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm run check:boundaries && pnpm build && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm run check:starters && pnpm test
